title: Taloos group
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Image}}
'''Taloos group''' was a group of [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]] [[Container transport|Container Transports]] that hauled supplies.

Following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], the two container transports were inspected by personnel stationed at [[Outpost D-34]], namely [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], and found to be carrying machinery. Their inspection coincided with a Rebel attack on the platform, but due to their peaceful nature, the craft were left to continue on their intended course.

*''[[Taloos 2]]''
